description: Phase WX-K.3 — subtype registry for the `endproduct` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Each subtype directory contains prompt-template.md (how the dispatcher constructs the generation prompt for the underlying API) + models.json (available models + per-call cost in compute tokens). The dispatcher resolves subtype → directory → loads template + model info → calls the appropriate gen service (DreamSnapImageGenService for image, future Lyria service for audio-music, TTSGenerateSkill for audio-voice, etc.). New subtypes added via PR + zero rebuild. The `dispatch` field tells the Swift dispatcher which service to call.

subtypes.description: Single image generated by a text-to-image model (Nano Banana 2 / DALL-E etc.).
Spoken audio narration via TTS (Apple Foundation / OpenAI / ElevenLabs etc.).
Instrumental or vocal music generated via Lyria 3 Pro etc.

Generated readable document (story / article / report / guide / lesson / explainer). Rendered into doc-scaffold.html and installed as a viewable end-product so it previews cleanly on macOS and the iOS bridge. Reserved image slots make a later illustration pass additive.
Multi-question quiz with structured JSON output.
App icon (multi-size PNG set) — composes image gen + icon-maker microservice.
Multi-voice scripted audio. Composes document (script) + audio-voice (multiple TTS calls).
